headlines.title: Foxconn reports 29.7% revenue rise on strong AI demand
headlines.summary: Taiwan's Foxconn, the world's largest contract electronics maker, saw first-quarter revenue surge on strong demand for artificial intelligence products.

headlines.title: NASA's Perseverance rover completes first AI-planned Mars drives
headlines.summary: Using Anthropic's Claude vision-language models, the rover analyzes orbital imagery and terrain data to autonomously generate safe waypoints.

headlines.title: AI companies shatter fundraising records with $297B in Q1
headlines.summary: OpenAI, Anthropic, Waymo and other AI companies hauled in $297 billion in funding in the first three months of 2026.

headlines.title: Google's new algorithm could eliminate AI's biggest bottleneck
headlines.summary: New development from Google could address one of the most significant limitations currently facing AI systems.

headlines.title: AI retail startups solving industry's 'silent killer' problem
headlines.summary: Generative AI virtual try-on technology is finally good enough to meaningfully impact retailers' bottom lines.

top_story.title: AI companies shatter fundraising records with $297B in Q1 2026
top_story.summary: OpenAI, Anthropic, Waymo and other artificial intelligence companies hauled in $297 billion in funding in the first three months of the year, marking an unprecedented investment boom.
